name: stable-baselines3
tagline: Guides Claude through training, evaluating, and persisting reinforcement-learning agents with Stable-Baselines3's PPO/SAC/DQN/TD3/DDPG/A2C.
verdict: Well-scoped, technically accurate RL library reference: clear when/when-not triggers, versioned, troubleshooting section, and bulk material correctly split into references/scripts. No security concerns found. Main gap: no explicit output-contract statement, though each sub-task's deliverable (saved model, eval metrics) is implicit and obvious.
